items.label: Bake Start Frame
items.description: Use mannequins for frame blocking to composite your character(s) into your backdrop. This produces the baked start frame. Then video model only adds motion based on prompt.
items.purpose: Use this when eyeline, exact framing, or lighting match matters.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Bake Start Frame works with any image editing model. xAI's image editing API will be used if you don't have a dedicated inpaint model; inpaint gives cleaner masks.

items.label: Auto-place Character
items.description: Provide character sheet + backdrop separately to the model and prompt drives these to make video. Model infers scale and position of character. Optionally use mannequins for frame blocking. No baking of first frame.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires an image-to-video model (Kling, Runway, Veo, Luma, etc.).

items.label: Pure B-roll (no character)
items.description: backdrop only, or text-to-video. Field Size, Lens, Angle drive the image generation. Prompt is just atmosphere and camera move: 'establishing wide shot, slow crane up through foggy forest'. No character sheet needed.

items.label: Start & End Frame
items.description: Produce two baked frames, model interpolates.
items.purpose: For product reveals or logo landings. Allows for a reliable opening and closing look.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires first/last frame control (Kling 3.0+, Runway Gen-4, Veo 3.1).

items.label: Motion Transfer / Performance
items.description: Upload reference video, apply to character. This is Kling Motion Control or Viggle-style. Your Field Size and Lens controls are ignored here — the motion defines the framing.
items.purpose: Application of motion or setting from one media asset to another

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires motion transfer / pose control (Kling, Viggle, Runway Act-One).

items.label: Multi-shot Sequence
items.description: One prompt generates 3–6 connected shots. Kling 3.0 does this. Your Subject Count and Coverage controls become shot-list items, not single-frame settings.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires Kling 3.0 or later for native multi-shot.

items.label: Camera Control
items.description: Drive camera moves on a static scene or first frame. No character animation — just crane, dolly, pan, tilt, orbit, or 3D orbit.
items.purpose: For establishing shots and product turntables where camera movement is the story.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires camera-control support (Runway Gen-4, Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1, Luma).

items.label: Video Inpaint / Object Removal
items.description: Remove objects, people, or blemishes from existing video. Paint a mask and the model fills the background with temporally consistent content.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires video inpainting (Runway Aleph, Kling, Pika).

items.label: Re-style / Lip-sync
items.description: Take existing footage, change style or add speech. Character sheet is optional, backdrop is the video itself.

modelRequirements.unavailableMessage: Requires video-to-video editing and/or lip-sync (Runway, Wan 2.7, Kling, HeyGen).
